title: Extend command_bead_show with --field PATH projection
description: Extend `command_bead_show` in `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/bead.py` to handle the new `--field` flag. When `args.field` is set: convert the loaded bead to a dict (via dataclasses.asdict or model_dump), call `format_bead_field(bead_dict, args.field)` from formatting.py, print the rendered string to stdout, and exit. For path-not-found or index-out-of-range errors from the resolver: print the error message to stderr, emit nothing to stdout, and exit non-zero. For null/empty-string-but-valid paths: print the empty line to stdout and exit zero. When `--field` is not set, the existing full-JSON output path is completely unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: --field status returns the bead status as a bare string with trailing newline
--field handoff_summary.completed returns the nested string value
--field execution_history[-1].event returns the last entry's event
--field for a missing path exits non-zero; stderr contains 'field not found: <path>'; stdout is empty
--field for a null value exits zero and emits a single newline
--field for a bool value emits lowercase true or false
--field for an int value emits the integer as a string
--field expected_files[99] on a 3-element list exits non-zero; stderr contains the actual length
takt bead show <id> with no --field returns the same output as before
